what_it_does: A Supabase CLI state file containing a single word, 'main', recording the currently selected Supabase branch for this local project.
observations: Lives under supabase/.branches/, a directory the sibling .gitignore lists as ignored.
This is CLI-managed local state, not authored configuration.
conventions: Follows the Supabase CLI convention of tracking the active branch in .branches/_current_branch.
notes: Generated Supabase CLI marker for the active branch; just says 'main'.
intention_signals: Records which Supabase branch the CLI is operating against so commands target the right environment.
contribution: Contributes the recorded active-branch state ('main') for the Supabase CLI project, indicating the project operates against the main branch.
summary_for_embedding: A Supabase CLI state file holding the single value 'main' to record the currently active branch.
intention_for_embedding: To track which Supabase branch the local CLI project is currently operating against.
